ddls:
CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the victim */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the victim */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the victim */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the victim */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the victim */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the victim */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the victim */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the victim's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offenders" (
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offender */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the offender */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the offender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the offender */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the offender */,
  "criminal_record" TEXT /* Details about the offender's criminal record */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the offender */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the offender */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the offender */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the offender */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offender's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offenders_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship type */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., acquaintance, family, stranger) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "data_year" INTEGER /* Year in which the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., theft, assault) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the incident */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was reported */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident location */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_incident_type FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES reporting_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victim_offender_relationships" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the victim involved */,
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offender involved */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship between victim and offender */,
  "nibrs_victim_offender_id" INTEGER /* NIBRS identifier for the victim-offender pair */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nibrs_victim_offender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victim_offender_relationships_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victim_offender_relationships_victim_id FOREIGN KEY ("victim_id") REFERENCES victims ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victim_offender_relationships_offender_id FOREIGN KEY ("offender_id") REFERENCES offenders ("offender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the incident */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the incident */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the incident */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agency */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_agencies_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., officer, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., login, logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident this report is associated with */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nibrs_codes" (
  "nibrs_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NIBRS code */,
  "nibrs_code" TEXT /* The NIBRS code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the NIBRS code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nibrs_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victim_offender_incidents" (
  "victim_offender_incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the victim-offender-incident relationship */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the victim involved */,
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offender involved */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with both */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_offender_incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victim_offender_incidents_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victim_offender_incidents_victim_id FOREIGN KEY ("victim_id") REFERENCES victims ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victim_offender_incidents_offender_id FOREIGN KEY ("offender_id") REFERENCES offenders ("offender_id")
)
